subject: Toni Frissell photograph from A Child's Garden of Verses. The image appears in the Wikimedia Commons category "The Family of Man (Steichen exhibition)" — implying inclusion in the 1955 exhibition — but the Wikimedia file description does not directly attest FoM membership, and Frissell is not yet seeded in our data/photographers.csv.
